example: I cooked the lasagna in a large baking dish.
He used a measuring spoon to add spices to the recipe.
I gently tapped the glass with a fork to make a sound.
He carefully peeled the apple with a sharp knife.
He served the salad on a large ceramic plate.
Sarah enjoyed her milkshake in a thick glass with a straw.
He used a spray bottle to mist the plants with water.
He admired the hand-painted design on the teacup.
He dropped the slippery soap in the shower.
I usually use a brush with natural bristles to distribute oils in my hair.
He applied toothpaste to his toothbrush and started brushing his teeth in circular motions.
I need to buy a new pillow for better neck support.
He emptied the full trash can into the larger dumpster outside.
He placed the puzzle pieces back into the puzzle box.
I misplaced my phone; it's the one thing I can't find right now.
I hit the ball with a golf club, sending it flying towards the hole.
My baby hugged his soft, plush doll tightly while sleeping.
